assessment_factors.name: Revenue Concentration
assessment_factors.description: Degree of revenue dependency on key clients or partners

scoring_criteria.1: Well diversified, no client >5% of revenue
scoring_criteria.5: Critical concentration, largest client >25% or key person >20%

assessment_factors.name: Regulatory Complexity
assessment_factors.description: Complexity of regulatory environment across operating jurisdictions

scoring_criteria.4: Multiple diverse jurisdictions with varying requirements
scoring_criteria.5: Highly complex multi-jurisdictional with emerging regulations

assessment_factors.name: Technology Dependency
assessment_factors.description: Reliance on technology systems for service delivery

scoring_criteria.2: Some automation but manual fallbacks exist
scoring_criteria.5: Critical dependency, service delivery impossible without systems

assessment_factors.name: Data Sensitivity
assessment_factors.description: Sensitivity and regulatory protection requirements of data handled

scoring_criteria.5: Special category data or cross-border sensitive transfers

assessment_factors.name: Integration Complexity
assessment_factors.description: Complexity of ongoing acquisition integration activities

scoring_criteria.5: Transformational integration with high execution risk

assessment_factors.name: Competitive Pressure
assessment_factors.description: Intensity of competitive threats to market position

scoring_criteria.5: Severe competitive pressure threatening market share

assessment_factors.name: Financial Leverage
assessment_factors.description: Debt levels and covenant compliance pressure

assessment_factors.name: Talent Risk
assessment_factors.description: Risk of losing critical personnel or inability to attract talent

scoring_criteria.4: Critical talent shortages, key person dependencies

factor_scores.rationale: Three partners control 22% of enterprise revenue
Critical key person dependencies without succession plans
EU AI Act High Risk classification requiring conformity assessment
High dependency on AI systems for client services
Net debt/EBITDA 3.2x with 0.3x covenant headroom in Q2
Revenue volatility concerns in recurring model

audit_plans.name: Azets 2025 Annual Audit Plan
audit_plans.description: Risk-based annual audit plan addressing key person risk, financial controls, acquisition integration, and regulatory compliance

audit_findings.title: Absence of Formal Succession Plans for Revenue-Critical Partners
audit_findings.criteria: ISO 22301 Business Continuity and enterprise risk management best practices require formal succession planning for critical personnel
audit_findings.condition: No documented succession plans exist for the 45 senior partners, including the three partners controlling 22% of enterprise revenue
audit_findings.cause: Lack of formalized succession planning framework and delayed implementation of previously committed succession protocols
audit_findings.effect: Material business continuity risk; sudden departure of key partners could result in €15-20M revenue at risk
audit_findings.recommendation: Immediately develop and implement succession plans for top 10 revenue-generating partners; establish partner transition protocols within 90 days
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. Engaged external consultants to develop succession framework. Implementation timeline extended to Q2 2025.

audit_findings.title: Inadequate Client Relationship Documentation for Key Partners
audit_findings.criteria: Client relationship management procedures should ensure institutional knowledge capture and relationship continuity
audit_findings.condition: Key client relationships managed by senior partners lack documented relationship history, contact protocols, and transition procedures
audit_findings.cause: Over-reliance on individual partner knowledge without systematic documentation requirements
audit_findings.effect: Client retention risk during partner transitions; potential revenue loss of 15-25% per transitioning partner
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement CRM requirements for all enterprise clients; mandate quarterly relationship documentation updates
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. CRM enhancement project initiated with target completion Q3 2025.

audit_findings.title: Insufficient Partner Departure Early Warning System
audit_findings.criteria: Human capital risk management requires proactive identification of departure risks for critical personnel
audit_findings.condition: No systematic monitoring of partner engagement, satisfaction, or departure risk indicators
audit_findings.cause: Lack of partner retention analytics and early warning mechanisms
audit_findings.effect: Inability to proactively address retention risks; reactive rather than preventive approach to partner departures
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement quarterly partner satisfaction surveys and departure risk scoring; establish retention intervention protocols
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. HR to develop partner engagement monitoring program by Q3 2025.

audit_findings.title: Inadequate Covenant Early Warning System
audit_findings.criteria: Debt covenant compliance requires proactive monitoring with adequate early warning lead time
audit_findings.condition: Covenant headroom narrowed to 0.3x in Q2 2025 without triggering management alerts until after monthly close
audit_findings.cause: Monthly covenant monitoring insufficient for volatile business conditions; lack of rolling forecast integration
audit_findings.effect: Potential covenant breach risk without adequate time for corrective action; lender relationship stress
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement weekly covenant tracking with rolling 13-week cash flow forecasts; establish graduated alert thresholds at 1.0x, 0.75x, and 0.5x headroom
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. Treasury implementing enhanced monitoring dashboard with weekly reporting to CFO.

audit_findings.title: Revenue Recognition Period-End Accrual Inconsistencies
audit_findings.criteria: ASC 606/IFRS 15 require consistent revenue recognition for professional services engagements
audit_findings.condition: Testing identified €2.3M of unbilled receivables with inconsistent percentage-of-completion estimates across Nordic countries
audit_findings.cause: Varying local interpretations of project completion milestones; insufficient standardization of WIP measurement
audit_findings.effect: Revenue recognition timing variations affecting quarterly reporting accuracy and trend analysis
audit_findings.recommendation: Standardize percentage-of-completion methodology across all jurisdictions; implement monthly WIP reconciliation
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted and implemented. Standardized WIP policy issued and training completed across all countries.

audit_findings.title: Stuttgart Integration Governance Framework Gaps
audit_findings.criteria: Acquisition integration requires comprehensive governance including clear accountability, milestone tracking, and risk monitoring
audit_findings.condition: Integration management office (IMO) structure incomplete; unclear escalation pathways for integration issues
audit_findings.cause: Rapid deal execution with insufficient time for comprehensive integration planning
audit_findings.effect: Integration execution risk; potential delays and cost overruns; regulatory compliance gaps during transition
audit_findings.recommendation: Establish formal IMO with dedicated program manager; implement weekly steering committee meetings; define clear RACI matrix
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. IMO structure being finalized; external integration advisor engaged.

audit_findings.title: German Steuerberatungsgesetz Compliance Assessment Incomplete
audit_findings.criteria: Steuerberatungsgesetz requires specific professional qualifications and practice standards for tax advisory services in Germany
audit_findings.condition: Full assessment of Stuttgart entity's compliance with German tax advisor regulations not completed prior to deal close
audit_findings.cause: Limited due diligence access during negotiation phase; complexity of German professional regulations
audit_findings.effect: Potential regulatory violations; risk of professional license issues; client service continuity concerns
audit_findings.recommendation: Engage German legal counsel for comprehensive Steuerberatungsgesetz compliance review; develop transition compliance plan
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. External German regulatory counsel engaged; comprehensive review underway.

audit_findings.title: EU AI Act Conformity Assessment Documentation Gaps
audit_findings.criteria: EU AI Act Article 9 requires comprehensive risk management system documentation for High Risk AI systems
audit_findings.condition: Fourth AI system classified as High Risk lacks complete conformity assessment documentation including risk management procedures and testing protocols
audit_findings.cause: Evolving regulatory requirements; resource constraints in compliance team; delayed guidance from regulators
audit_findings.effect: Potential regulatory non-compliance; risk of enforcement action; reputational damage
audit_findings.recommendation: Complete conformity assessment documentation; establish AI compliance monitoring framework; engage external AI audit specialists
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. AI compliance project team established; documentation completion on track for Q2.

audit_findings.title: AI System Bias Testing Methodology Deficiencies
audit_findings.criteria: EU AI Act requires bias testing and monitoring for High Risk AI systems
audit_findings.condition: Current bias testing methodology does not adequately cover all protected characteristics under EU non-discrimination law
audit_findings.cause: Initial methodology developed before full EU AI Act requirements were known
audit_findings.effect: Potential discriminatory outcomes; regulatory compliance risk; client trust concerns
audit_findings.recommendation: Enhance bias testing methodology to cover all protected characteristics; implement ongoing bias monitoring
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. External AI ethics consultants engaged to enhance testing methodology.

audit_findings.title: Cross-Border Data Transfer Documentation Incomplete
audit_findings.criteria: GDPR requires documented legal basis for cross-border personal data transfers
audit_findings.condition: Three data transfer arrangements between Nordic entities and UK operations lacked updated Standard Contractual Clauses post-Brexit
audit_findings.cause: Brexit transition documentation not fully updated; oversight in annual GDPR review
audit_findings.effect: Technical GDPR non-compliance; limited enforcement risk given intra-group nature
audit_findings.recommendation: Update all cross-border data transfer agreements; implement annual data transfer mapping review
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted and implemented. All SCCs updated; annual review process established.

audit_findings.title: SMB Client Churn Root Cause Analysis Inadequate
audit_findings.criteria: Client retention management requires systematic analysis of churn drivers and competitive intelligence
audit_findings.condition: 9.1% SMB churn rate tracked but root cause analysis limited; competitive displacement by Fortnox/Visma not systematically analyzed
audit_findings.cause: Insufficient competitive intelligence function; exit interview process inconsistent
audit_findings.effect: Continued market share erosion; inability to develop effective retention strategies
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement mandatory exit interviews for all churning SMB clients; establish competitive intelligence program; develop win-back strategies
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. Exit interview process being redesigned; competitive analysis function being resourced.

audit_findings.title: SMB Pricing Strategy Not Aligned with Competitive Positioning
audit_findings.criteria: Pricing strategy should reflect competitive positioning and value proposition
audit_findings.condition: SMB pricing 15-25% premium to cloud-native competitors without corresponding differentiated value proposition
audit_findings.cause: Legacy pricing model not updated for changed competitive landscape
audit_findings.effect: Price-sensitive clients migrating to lower-cost alternatives; margin pressure
audit_findings.recommendation: Conduct comprehensive pricing review; develop tiered service offerings; consider defensive pricing for at-risk segments
audit_findings.management_response: Partially accepted. Pricing review initiated; strategic decision pending board input.

audit_findings.title: Platform Modernization Investment Governance Weaknesses
audit_findings.criteria: Major technology investments require robust governance including stage-gate reviews and benefit tracking
audit_findings.condition: $8M+ platform modernization program lacks formal stage-gate governance; benefit realization tracking not established
audit_findings.cause: Program initiated under time pressure; governance framework not fully developed
audit_findings.effect: Investment at risk; inability to demonstrate ROI; potential cost overruns without early detection
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement formal stage-gate governance model; establish benefit realization framework with measurable KPIs
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. Stage-gate framework being developed with external PMO consultants.

audit_findings.title: Workforce Reduction Impact on Control Environment Not Assessed
audit_findings.criteria: Significant organizational changes require assessment of impact on internal control environment
audit_findings.condition: 1,314 FTE reduction implemented without formal assessment of impact on segregation of duties and control execution
audit_findings.cause: Cost reduction priority without parallel control impact assessment
audit_findings.effect: Potential control gaps; increased manual control burden on remaining staff; elevated error risk
audit_findings.recommendation: Conduct comprehensive control impact assessment; identify and remediate segregation of duties conflicts; adjust control frequencies as needed
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. Control impact assessment initiated; preliminary results expected by Q3 end.

audit_findings.title: Knowledge Transfer During Workforce Reduction Inadequate
audit_findings.criteria: Workforce transitions should include documented knowledge transfer for critical processes
audit_findings.condition: Limited formal knowledge transfer documentation for departing employees in control-critical roles
audit_findings.cause: Rapid workforce reduction timeline; insufficient transition planning
audit_findings.effect: Loss of institutional knowledge; potential process disruption; increased control execution risk
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement mandatory knowledge transfer protocols for departing employees; document critical process knowledge
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. Knowledge transfer template developed; retrospective documentation underway.

audit_findings.title: Going Concern Stress Testing Scenarios Require Enhancement
audit_findings.criteria: Going concern assessment requires stress testing under reasonably possible adverse scenarios
audit_findings.condition: Initial stress testing did not adequately model combined impact of covenant breach, competitive pressure, and integration delays
audit_findings.cause: Scenarios modeled individually rather than combined stress cases
audit_findings.effect: Potentially understated going concern risk exposure
audit_findings.recommendation: Develop combined stress scenarios; model covenant breach with 18-month forward liquidity; include integration cost overrun scenarios
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted and implemented. Enhanced stress testing completed; results shared with audit committee.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Expert judgment with succession plan completion
risk_assessments.notes: Succession plans completed for top 10 partners. CRM fully deployed. Retention incentives implemented. Still above appetite.

risk_mitigation_plans.name: Key Person Succession Planning Program
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Comprehensive program to develop succession plans for revenue-critical partners and enhance client relationship documentation

risk_mitigation_plans.name: Enhanced Covenant Monitoring and Liquidity Management
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Implementation of enhanced covenant monitoring, rolling forecasts, and liquidity management protocols

risk_mitigation_plans.name: Stuttgart Integration Governance Enhancement
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Establishment of Integration Management Office and governance framework for Stuttgart acquisition

risk_mitigation_plans.name: SMB Competitive Response Initiative
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Strategic initiative to address SMB client churn through enhanced service offerings and pricing optimization

risk_mitigation_plans.name: EU AI Act Compliance Program
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Comprehensive program to achieve and maintain EU AI Act compliance for High Risk classified systems

controls.name: Revenue Recognition Policy Compliance
controls.description: Standardized percentage-of-completion methodology and monthly WIP reconciliation across all countries
controls.test_procedure: Review WIP reconciliations for three sample months; verify percentage-of-completion calculations
controls.evidence_required: WIP reconciliation reports, engagement completion assessments

controls.name: Period-End Revenue Cut-off Procedures
controls.description: Formal period-end cut-off procedures ensuring revenue recognized in correct period
controls.test_procedure: Test revenue transactions around period-end dates for correct cut-off
controls.evidence_required: Cut-off testing documentation, engagement letters, completion certificates

controls.name: Weekly Covenant Compliance Monitoring
controls.description: Weekly calculation and monitoring of debt covenant compliance with graduated alert thresholds
controls.test_procedure: Verify weekly covenant calculations; test alert threshold triggers; review escalation documentation
controls.evidence_required: Weekly covenant calculations, alert notifications, escalation records

controls.name: Rolling 13-Week Cash Flow Forecast
controls.description: Weekly rolling cash flow forecast integrated with covenant monitoring for early warning
controls.test_procedure: Review forecast accuracy versus actuals; verify integration with covenant dashboard
controls.evidence_required: Rolling forecasts, variance analysis, covenant integration evidence

controls.name: Lender Compliance Certification
controls.description: Quarterly covenant compliance certification to lenders with management attestation
controls.test_procedure: Review quarterly certifications; verify accuracy of reported metrics; confirm timely submission
controls.evidence_required: Compliance certificates, lender acknowledgments

controls.name: Partner Succession Planning Framework
controls.description: Formal succession planning process for senior partners including documented plans and annual reviews
controls.test_procedure: Review succession plans for completeness; verify annual reviews conducted; assess readiness of successors
controls.evidence_required: Succession plans, review documentation, successor development plans

controls.name: Partner Retention Monitoring
controls.description: Quarterly monitoring of partner engagement and departure risk indicators with intervention protocols
controls.test_procedure: Review engagement survey results; assess departure risk scoring; verify intervention actions
controls.evidence_required: Engagement surveys, risk scores, intervention records

controls.name: Integration Management Office Governance
controls.description: Formal IMO structure with weekly steering committee meetings and clear escalation pathways
controls.test_procedure: Review steering committee minutes; verify escalation documentation; assess milestone tracking
controls.evidence_required: Meeting minutes, RACI matrix, escalation records

controls.name: Integration Milestone Tracking
controls.description: Formal milestone tracking with variance reporting and corrective action protocols
controls.test_procedure: Review milestone reports; verify variance analysis; assess corrective action effectiveness
controls.evidence_required: Milestone dashboards, variance reports, corrective action logs

controls.name: Integration Risk Register
controls.description: Dedicated integration risk register with weekly review and mitigation tracking
controls.test_procedure: Review risk register completeness; verify weekly updates; assess mitigation progress
controls.evidence_required: Risk register, update logs, mitigation status reports

controls.name: Multi-Jurisdictional Regulatory Monitoring
controls.description: Systematic monitoring of regulatory changes across operating jurisdictions with impact assessment
controls.test_procedure: Review regulatory change log; verify impact assessments; assess implementation tracking
controls.evidence_required: Regulatory change register, impact assessments, implementation plans

controls.name: German Steuerberatungsgesetz Compliance
controls.description: Specific compliance framework for German tax advisory regulations including qualification verification
controls.test_procedure: Verify practitioner qualifications; review compliance with practice standards; assess documentation
controls.evidence_required: Qualification certificates, practice compliance records, regulatory correspondence

controls.name: AI System Risk Management
controls.description: Comprehensive risk management system for High Risk AI systems per EU AI Act Article 9
controls.test_procedure: Review risk management documentation; verify risk identification and mitigation; assess ongoing monitoring
controls.evidence_required: AI risk register, mitigation plans, monitoring reports

controls.name: AI Conformity Assessment Documentation
controls.description: Complete conformity assessment documentation for High Risk AI systems including technical documentation
controls.test_procedure: Review conformity documentation completeness; verify technical documentation accuracy; assess updates
controls.evidence_required: Conformity assessment files, technical documentation, update logs

controls.name: AI Bias Testing and Monitoring
controls.description: Enhanced bias testing methodology covering all protected characteristics with ongoing monitoring
controls.test_procedure: Review bias testing results; verify coverage of protected characteristics; assess remediation actions
controls.evidence_required: Bias test reports, coverage documentation, remediation records

controls.name: Cross-Border Data Transfer Management
controls.description: Management of cross-border personal data transfers with appropriate legal mechanisms (SCCs, adequacy)
controls.test_procedure: Review data transfer register; verify SCCs in place; assess transfer impact assessments
controls.evidence_required: Transfer register, SCCs, TIAs

controls.name: Annual Data Transfer Mapping Review
controls.description: Annual review of all cross-border data transfers with documentation updates
controls.test_procedure: Verify annual review completion; assess documentation updates; review new transfers
controls.evidence_required: Annual review report, updated data maps, new transfer documentation

controls.name: SMB Client Retention Monitoring
controls.description: Monthly monitoring of SMB client churn with root cause analysis and intervention triggers
controls.test_procedure: Review churn analytics; verify root cause analysis quality; assess intervention effectiveness
controls.evidence_required: Churn reports, root cause analysis, intervention records

controls.name: Competitive Intelligence Program
controls.description: Systematic competitive intelligence gathering and analysis with strategic response recommendations
controls.test_procedure: Review competitive intelligence reports; verify analysis quality; assess strategic response integration
controls.evidence_required: CI reports, competitive analysis, strategic recommendations

controls.name: Platform Modernization Stage-Gate Governance
controls.description: Formal stage-gate governance model with defined criteria and investment approval checkpoints
controls.test_procedure: Review gate passage documentation; verify criteria assessment; assess approval decisions
controls.evidence_required: Gate review packages, criteria assessments, approval records

controls.name: Technology Investment Benefit Tracking
controls.description: Ongoing tracking of expected benefits with variance analysis and corrective action
controls.test_procedure: Review benefit tracking reports; verify variance analysis; assess corrective actions
controls.evidence_required: Benefit tracking dashboards, variance reports, corrective action logs

controls.name: Organizational Change Control Impact Assessment
controls.description: Formal assessment of control environment impact for significant organizational changes
controls.test_procedure: Review change impact assessments; verify control gap identification; assess remediation planning
controls.evidence_required: Impact assessments, control gap analysis, remediation plans

controls.name: Segregation of Duties Monitoring
controls.description: Ongoing monitoring of segregation of duties with conflict detection and remediation
controls.test_procedure: Review SoD conflict reports; verify remediation of identified conflicts; assess monitoring effectiveness
controls.evidence_required: SoD reports, conflict resolution records, access matrices

controls.name: Client Data Classification and Handling
controls.description: Data classification framework with handling procedures based on sensitivity levels
controls.test_procedure: Review classification accuracy; verify handling procedure compliance; assess exception management
controls.evidence_required: Classification records, handling logs, exception reports

controls.name: Data Loss Prevention Controls
controls.description: Technical DLP controls preventing unauthorized data exfiltration
controls.test_procedure: Test DLP rule effectiveness; review blocking logs; verify policy updates
controls.evidence_required: DLP logs, rule effectiveness tests, policy documentation

controls.name: Technology Roadmap Governance
controls.description: Formal technology roadmap with annual review and alignment to business strategy
controls.test_procedure: Review roadmap completeness; verify strategy alignment; assess progress tracking
controls.evidence_required: Technology roadmap, strategy alignment documentation, progress reports

controls.name: Workforce Transition Knowledge Management
controls.description: Knowledge transfer protocols for departing employees in control-critical roles
controls.test_procedure: Review knowledge transfer documentation; verify completion for departing employees; assess quality
controls.evidence_required: Knowledge transfer templates, completion records, quality assessments

controls.name: Access Control Management
controls.description: Identity and access management controls including joiner/mover/leaver processes
controls.test_procedure: Test JML process effectiveness; review access provisioning accuracy; verify timely deprovisioning
controls.evidence_required: JML process logs, access reviews, deprovisioning records

controls.name: Security Monitoring and Detection
controls.description: 24/7 security monitoring with automated threat detection and incident escalation
controls.test_procedure: Review detection effectiveness; test alert response times; verify escalation procedures
controls.evidence_required: SIEM logs, incident records, response time metrics

controls.name: Vulnerability Management
controls.description: Systematic vulnerability scanning and remediation with risk-based prioritization
controls.test_procedure: Review scan coverage; verify remediation SLA compliance; assess critical vulnerability response
controls.evidence_required: Scan reports, remediation records, SLA metrics

controls.name: Security Incident Response
controls.description: Formal incident response procedures with defined escalation and communication protocols
controls.test_procedure: Review incident response exercises; verify procedure documentation; assess post-incident reviews
controls.evidence_required: Incident response plans, exercise records, post-incident reports

controls.name: Engagement Quality Review
controls.description: Mandatory quality review for professional service engagements based on risk criteria
controls.test_procedure: Review engagement selection criteria; verify review completion rates; assess finding remediation
controls.evidence_required: Review checklists, completion records, remediation logs

controls.name: Professional Standards Compliance
controls.description: Compliance with professional accounting and tax standards including methodology updates
controls.test_procedure: Review methodology currency; verify training completion; assess compliance monitoring
controls.evidence_required: Methodology updates, training records, compliance reports

controls.name: Client Complaint Management
controls.description: Systematic tracking and resolution of client complaints with root cause analysis
controls.test_procedure: Review complaint handling timeliness; verify root cause analysis quality; assess corrective actions
controls.evidence_required: Complaint logs, root cause analysis, corrective action records

controls.name: Vendor Due Diligence and Onboarding
controls.description: Formal due diligence process for new vendors including security and compliance assessment
controls.test_procedure: Review due diligence completeness; verify assessment criteria coverage; assess approval process
controls.evidence_required: Due diligence questionnaires, assessment reports, approval records

controls.name: Vendor Performance Monitoring
controls.description: Ongoing monitoring of vendor performance including SLA compliance and security posture
controls.test_procedure: Review performance reports; verify SLA monitoring; assess security reassessments
controls.evidence_required: Performance dashboards, SLA reports, security assessments

controls.name: Business Continuity Planning
controls.description: Comprehensive BCP including documented plans, annual testing, and update procedures
controls.test_procedure: Review BCP completeness; verify annual test execution; assess plan updates
controls.evidence_required: BCP documentation, test reports, update logs

controls.name: Disaster Recovery Testing
controls.description: Regular DR testing including failover/failback procedures and recovery time validation
controls.test_procedure: Review DR test results; verify RTO/RPO achievement; assess remediation of gaps
controls.evidence_required: DR test reports, RTO/RPO metrics, remediation records

controls.name: Client Relationship Documentation
controls.description: Mandatory CRM documentation for enterprise clients including relationship history and contacts
controls.test_procedure: Review CRM completeness; verify update frequency; assess documentation quality
controls.evidence_required: CRM records, update logs, quality assessments

controls.name: Revenue Pipeline Visibility
controls.description: Monthly revenue pipeline review with forecast accuracy tracking
controls.test_procedure: Review pipeline reports; verify forecast accuracy; assess variance analysis
controls.evidence_required: Pipeline reports, forecast vs actual analysis, variance records

controls.name: Related Party Transaction Approval
controls.description: Formal approval process for related party transactions with independence requirements
controls.test_procedure: Review transaction approvals; verify independence; assess arm's length documentation
controls.evidence_required: Approval records, independence declarations, pricing documentation

controls.name: Related Party Disclosure Monitoring
controls.description: Comprehensive tracking and disclosure of related party transactions per IAS 24
controls.test_procedure: Review disclosure completeness; verify transaction capture; assess disclosure accuracy
controls.evidence_required: Disclosure schedules, transaction logs, disclosure documentation

controls.name: Goodwill Impairment Indicator Monitoring
controls.description: Quarterly monitoring of impairment indicators with documented assessment
controls.test_procedure: Review indicator monitoring; verify assessment documentation; assess trigger identification
controls.evidence_required: Indicator assessments, market analysis, trigger documentation

controls.name: Annual Impairment Testing
controls.description: Annual goodwill impairment testing with documented valuation methodology
controls.test_procedure: Review impairment test methodology; verify assumptions; assess sensitivity analysis
controls.evidence_required: Impairment test documentation, valuation reports, sensitivity analysis

controls.name: Margin Performance Monitoring
controls.description: Monthly monitoring of EBITDA margins by business unit with variance analysis
controls.test_procedure: Review margin reports; verify variance analysis; assess corrective action tracking
controls.evidence_required: Margin reports, variance analysis, management commentary

controls.name: Cost Management Programs
controls.description: Structured cost management initiatives with tracked savings targets
controls.test_procedure: Review savings tracking; verify initiative progress; assess target achievement
controls.evidence_required: Savings reports, initiative dashboards, achievement records

controls.name: Professional License Tracking
controls.description: Centralized tracking of professional licenses with renewal alerts
controls.test_procedure: Review license register; verify renewal tracking; assess alert effectiveness
controls.evidence_required: License register, renewal records, alert logs

controls.name: Professional Qualification Verification
controls.description: Verification of professional qualifications for new hires and promotions
controls.test_procedure: Review verification procedures; verify documentation completeness; assess exception handling
controls.evidence_required: Verification records, qualification certificates, exception logs

control_assessments.test_evidence: Reviewed WIP reconciliations for Jan-Mar. Inconsistencies found in Sweden and Denmark completion percentage calculations.
Retested WIP reconciliations post-policy standardization. All countries using consistent methodology. No exceptions noted.
Covenant monitoring did not trigger alerts when headroom narrowed to 0.3x. Weekly monitoring not yet implemented.
Weekly monitoring dashboard implemented. Tested alert triggers at all threshold levels. Escalation documentation verified.
No formal succession plans documented for any of the 45 senior partners. Framework not yet developed.
Succession plans drafted for top 5 partners. Framework developed. Remaining 40 partners in progress.
IMO structure incomplete. RACI not defined. Escalation pathways unclear. Weekly meetings not yet established.
IMO fully operational. Reviewed 12 weeks of steering committee minutes. RACI clear. Escalations documented.
Risk management system exists but documentation incomplete for fourth High Risk AI system.
All documentation complete. Risk identification comprehensive. Mitigation tracking operational.
Three UK-Nordic transfers identified without updated SCCs post-Brexit.
All SCCs updated. Transfer register comprehensive. Annual review process established.
Churn monitoring in place but root cause analysis superficial. Exit interviews not consistently conducted.
Exit interview process improved. Root cause analysis enhanced but still building capability.
No formal stage-gate governance in place for platform modernization program.
Stage-gate framework implemented. First two gates passed with documented criteria assessment.
Workforce reduction proceeded without formal control impact assessment. Retrospective assessment underway.
JML process tested for 50 sample users. Provisioning accurate. Deprovisioning timely (within 24 hours).
Engagement review completion rate at 95%. Sample of 20 reviews assessed for quality - all satisfactory.
All 2024 and 2025 YTD related party transactions reviewed. Proper approval documented. Arm's length pricing verified.

control_deficiencies.description: Inconsistent percentage-of-completion methodology across Nordic countries leading to €2.3M unbilled receivable discrepancies
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Local interpretation variations without centralized policy enforcement
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement standardized WIP policy with mandatory training

control_deficiencies.description: Monthly covenant monitoring insufficient for volatile business conditions; lack of graduated alert thresholds
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Control design not updated for changing risk profile and covenant tightness
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement weekly monitoring with rolling forecasts and graduated alerts

control_deficiencies.description: No formal succession planning framework for senior partners controlling significant revenue
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Historical reliance on informal succession without structured program
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Develop and implement comprehensive succession planning framework

control_deficiencies.description: Integration Management Office structure incomplete for Stuttgart acquisition
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Rapid deal execution without parallel integration governance development
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Establish formal IMO with dedicated program manager and governance framework

control_deficiencies.description: Incomplete conformity assessment documentation for High Risk AI system
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Evolving regulatory requirements and resource constraints
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Complete all required documentation; establish ongoing compliance monitoring

control_deficiencies.description: Three UK-Nordic data transfers without updated Standard Contractual Clauses post-Brexit
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Brexit transition documentation not fully updated in annual review
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Update all SCCs; implement annual data transfer mapping review

control_deficiencies.description: Inadequate root cause analysis for SMB client churn; inconsistent exit interviews
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Insufficient competitive intelligence function and exit interview process
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement mandatory exit interviews; establish competitive intelligence program

control_deficiencies.description: Platform modernization program lacks formal stage-gate governance
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Program initiated under time pressure without governance framework

control_deficiencies.description: Workforce reduction implemented without formal control impact assessment
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Cost reduction priority without parallel control assessment requirement
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Conduct comprehensive control impact assessment; remediate identified gaps
